reasoning: Every component maps correctly: `[Fintype α]` plus `Fintype.card α > 1` captures "finite set A with |A|>1"; `G : Subgroup (Equiv.Perm α)` is exactly a permutation group on A (subgroup of the symmetric group); `h_tran : ∀ a b : α, ∃ σ : G, (σ : Equiv.Perm α) a = b` is the standard definition of transitivity matching Mathlib's `MulAction.IsPretransitive`; and the conclusion `∃ σ : G, ∀ a : α, (σ : Equiv.Perm α) a ≠ a` is exactly "there is some σ ∈ G with σ(a) ≠ a for all a ∈ A" (a derangement). The quantifier structure, types, and hypotheses all correspond one-to-one with the informal statement, with no added or dropped hypotheses.
